raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "To Lewitu Pilſſahti: 1. Un winnu Starpâ
fefchi Gelbeſchanas,Pilſſahti : 6. Preeſch
teem/kas netibſchi kahdu Zilweku nokawu-
fchi: 11/12/25. Us weena paſcha Leezi-
neeka Leezibu ne buhs ne weenu nokaut: 30.
Bet tibſcha Elepkatwiba ne warr falihdſinata
tapt/ beß kà zaar ta Glepkawa Affinim: 33.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "N tas KUNGS run-
naja us Mohfu/ Moa-
ba Klatjumôß/pee Jar-
danas/ prett Jeriku/un fazzija:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pawehli teem Israëta
Behrneem/ ka teem buhs no tahs
Dallibas fawa eemantojana Jh-
pafchuma teem Lewiteem Pilś-
fah tus doht/ kur tee dshwoht
warr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jums buhs arri teem
Lewiteem Preeſch-Pilśfahtus
ahra apkahrt winno Pilśfahteem
doht; Un tee Pilśfahti teem
buhs/ka tee paſchi eeſch teem dsh-
woht warr/bet tee Preeſch-Pilś-
fahti laid irr preeſch winnu Loh-
peem / un preeſch winno Man-
tu/-un preeſch wiſfeem winnu
gannateem Pulkeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tohs Preeſch-Pilśfah-
tus/ ko juhs teem Lewiteem doh-
feet / laid irr no ta Pilśfahta
Muḥreem uhs Ahra-puſſi tuhē-
ſtoschas Ohlektis apkahrt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un jums buhs mehroht no
Ahra-puſſes ta Pilśfahta prett
Rihta Stuhri/ divituhkſtochas
Ohlektis/ un prett Deenas-Wid-
dusStuhri divituhkſtochas Oh-
lektis/ un prett Wakkara Stub-
ri divituhkſtochas Ohlektis / un
prett Seemeta Stuhri divituhk-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "ftoschas Ohlektis/ ka tas Pilś-
fahts Widdu effus/ tik daudf
Semmes buhsteem parPreeſch-
Pilśfahteem no teem Pilśfah-
teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "6. Un tee Pilśfahti / ko juhs
teem Lewiteem dohfeet / laid irr
Gelbeſchanas - Pilśfahti / kas
juns jadobd / ka tee Nokatwei
us turren behg / un wehl pah-
teem buhs jums winneem weh-
tſchetrdefinitis diwi Pilśfahtus
doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "7. Wiſſi Pilśfahti / ko juhs
teem Lewiteem dohfeet / laid irr
tſchetrdefinitis aston Pilśfahti/
lihds ar jaween Preeſch-Pilś-
fahteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "8. Un to Pilśfahtu / ko juhs
no to Israëta Behrnu Dallibas
dohfeet/buhs jums dauds no teem
neint/kam dauds irr/un no teem/
kam maſ irr / buhs jums ma-
neint/ikweenam buhs pehz faru-
eemantojamu Jhpafchumu / ke-
tas par eemantojamu Jhpafchu-
imu dabbiuſ / no jaweem Pilś-
fahteem teem Lewiteem doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "9. Un tas KUNGS runnaja
us Mohfu/un fazzija :
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Runna us teem Israëta
Behrneem / un fakki us teem
Kad juhs pahr to Jardanu ze-
fitees us to Kanaäna Semmi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Tad buhs jums Pilśfah-
tus eezelt/ kas preeſch jums pa-
Gelbeſchanas-Pilśfahteem war-
buht / ka us turren tas Nokatwei-
behgt warr / kas kahdu Zilweku-
netibſchu nokawis irr.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
